title: MISSION BENEDICT - 211info
text: ST JOSEPH FAMILY SHELTER MISSION BENEDICT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a food pantry. When funding is available, offers emergency financial assistance for electricity, gas, water/sewer, and prescription costs. 840 S Main Street Mount Angel, OR 97362 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday 3pm-6pm, Wednesday 11am-2pm, Thursday-Friday 1pm-3pm Email (503) 385-3231 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 385-3231 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of address LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Marion County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Seven miles SE of Woodburn off I-5.4 miles north of Silverton, 15 miles east of Salem, 47 miles SE of Portland. Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance Food Pantries Gas Service Payment Assistance Prescription Expense Assistance Water Service Payment Assistance If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ST JOSEPH FAMILY SHELTER
